2026-04-20T10:39:56.6835768Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6836680Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6837359Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6837954Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6838461Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6839136Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6839390Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6839679Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6839951Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6840336Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6840671Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6841148Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-20T10:39:56.6841582Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Include context, reproduction steps, or acceptance criteria as appropriate.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Labels to categorize the issue (e.g., 'bug', 'enhancement'). Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"message":{"description":"Status or completion message to log. Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"details":{"description":"Optional extended details or diagnostic context about the failure (max 65000 characters).","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"A concise explanation of why the task could not be completed (max 1024 characters). This is the first beta in the new minor cycle, making it a good moment to address accumulated documentation debt.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **Wrong package name in install command**: The README `Getting Started` section shows `dotnet add package Azure.ResourceManager.AnalysisServices`, but the actual NuGet package ID is `Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis`\n- **No inline code examples**: The `Examples` section links only to an external samples page with no inline code snippets, making it impossible to understand usage without leaving the README\n- **Key Concepts section lacks substance**: Contains only a link to general Azure SDK docs; does not explain the package-specific types (`AnalysisServerResource`, `AnalysisServerCollection`, `AnalysisServerData`) or the resource hierarchy\n- **No `tests/Samples/` directory**: There are no snippet-backed test files, so no code is eligible for injection via `Update-Snippets.ps1`\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n#### Fix the package name in the install command\n\n**File:** `sdk/analysisservices/Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis/README.md`\n**Action:** Edit — replace the wrong package name in the install block\n\nReplace:\n```dotnetcli\ndotnet add package Azure.ResourceManager.AnalysisServices\n```\nWith:\n```dotnetcli\ndotnet add package Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis\n```\n\n#### Enrich the Key Concepts section\n\n**File:** `sdk/analysisservices/Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis/README.md`\n**Action:** Edit — replace the thin Key Concepts section with substantive content\n\nReplace the existing Key Concepts section:\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).\n```\n\nWith:\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).\n\n### AnalysisServerResource\n\nRepresents an Azure Analysis Services server resource. Use this to get, update, delete, suspend, or resume an individual server, and to manage firewall rules and gateway status.\n\n### AnalysisServerCollection\n\nThe collection of `AnalysisServerResource` objects scoped to a resource group. Use `GetAnalysisServers()` on a `ResourceGroupResource` to obtain the collection. Supports creating, listing, and checking existence of Analysis Services servers.\n\n### AnalysisServerData\n\nThe data (properties) of an Analysis Services server including SKU, location, administrator identities, backup storage URI, and current provisioning state.\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n#### Create a sample test file\n\n**File:** `sdk/analysisservices/Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis/tests/Samples/Sample1_HelloWorld.cs`\n**Action:** Create\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis.Models;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample1_HelloWorld\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task CreateAnalysisServer()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:CreateAnalysisServer\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            // Get a resource group\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cresource-group-name\u003e\";\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\"))\n                .GetResourceGroups()\n                .GetAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            // Get the Analysis Services server collection\n            AnalysisServerCollection collection = resourceGroup.GetAnalysisServers();\n\n            // Define the server\n            string serverName = \"myanalysisserver\";\n            var sku = new AnalysisResourceSku(\"S1\") { Tier = AnalysisSkuTier.Standard };\n            var serverData = new AnalysisServerData(new Azure.Core.AzureLocation(\"eastus\"), sku);\n\n            // Create the server\n            ArmOperation\u003cAnalysisServerResource\u003e lro = await collection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\n                serverName,\n                serverData);\n            AnalysisServerResource server = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created server: {server.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task GetAnalysisServer()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:GetAnalysisServer\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cresource-group-name\u003e\";\n            string serverName = \"myanalysisserver\";\n\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\"))\n                .GetResourceGroups()\n                .GetAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            AnalysisServerResource server = await resourceGroup\n                .GetAnalysisServers()\n                .GetAsync(serverName);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Server state: {server.Data.State}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task ListAnalysisServers()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:ListAnalysisServers\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cresource-group-name\u003e\";\n\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\"))\n                .GetResourceGroups()\n                .GetAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            await foreach (AnalysisServerResource server in resourceGroup.GetAnalysisServers())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"  {server.Data.Name} ({server.Data.State})\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task DeleteAnalysisServer()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:DeleteAnalysisServer\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"\u003cresource-group-name\u003e\";\n            string serverName = \"myanalysisserver\";\n\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client\n                .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\"))\n                .GetResourceGroups()\n                .GetAsync(resourceGroupName);\n\n            AnalysisServerResource server = await resourceGroup\n                .GetAnalysisServers()\n                .GetAsync(serverName);\n            await server.DeleteAsync(WaitUntil.Completed);\n            Console.WriteLine(\"Server deleted.\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n#### Add snippet placeholders in the README Examples section\n\n**File:** 2026-04-20T10:43:22.9052813Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9052939Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis`
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9053148Z **Service directory:** `sdk/analysisservices/Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis/`
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9053301Z **Triggered by:** commit eff4c040a (PR #58373) by @azure-sdk
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9053305Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9053385Z ## What Changed
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9053389Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9054136Z The Azure SDK Bot incremented the package version to `1.2.0-beta.1` following the stable `1.1.2` release of `Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis`. This is the first beta in the new minor cycle, making it a good moment to address accumulated documentation debt.
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9054238Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9054322Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9054326Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9055099Z - **Wrong package name in install command**: The README `Getting Started` section shows `dotnet add package Azure.ResourceManager.AnalysisServices`, but the actual NuGet package ID is `Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis`
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9055637Z - **No inline code examples**: The `Examples` section links only to an external samples page with no inline code snippets, making it impossible to understand usage without leaving the README
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9056364Z - **Key Concepts section lacks substance**: Contains only a link to general Azure SDK docs; does not explain the package-specific types (`AnalysisServerResource`, `AnalysisServerCollection`, `AnalysisServerData`) or the resource hierarchy
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9056748Z - **No `tests/Samples/` directory**: There are no snippet-backed test files, so no code is eligible for injection via `Update-Snippets.ps1`
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9056759Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9056841Z <details>
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057065Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057070Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057395Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057399Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057483Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057488Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057606Z #### Fix the package name in the install command
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057610Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9057804Z **File:** `sdk/analysisservices/Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis/README.md`
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058043Z **Action:** Edit — replace the wrong package name in the install block
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058048Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058122Z Replace:
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058200Z ```dotnetcli
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058361Z dotnet add package Azure.ResourceManager.AnalysisServices
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058442Z ```
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058511Z With:
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058582Z ```dotnetcli
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058840Z dotnet add package Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058909Z ```
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9058913Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059009Z #### Enrich the Key Concepts section
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059014Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059198Z **File:** `sdk/analysisservices/Azure.ResourceManager.Analysis/README.md`
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059471Z **Action:** Edit — replace the thin Key Concepts section with substantive content
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059475Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059580Z Replace the existing Key Concepts section:
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059657Z ```markdown
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059732Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9059736Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060113Z Key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060181Z ```
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060185Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060267Z With:
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060337Z ```markdown
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060414Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060418Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060757Z Key concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060761Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060855Z ### AnalysisServerResource
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9060860Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9061374Z Represents an Azure Analysis Services server resource. Use this to get, update, delete, suspend, or resume an individual server, and to manage firewall rules and gateway status.
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9061379Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9061474Z ### AnalysisServerCollection
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9061478Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9062213Z The collection of `AnalysisServerResource` objects scoped to a resource group. Use `GetAnalysisServers()` on a `ResourceGroupResource` to obtain the collection. Supports creating, listing, and checking existence of Analysis Services servers.
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9062351Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9062439Z ### AnalysisServerData
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9062443Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9062914Z The data (properties) of an Analysis Services server including SKU, location, administrator identities, backup storage URI, and current provisioning state.
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9062990Z ```
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9062993Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9063089Z ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9063093Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9063185Z #### Create a sample test file
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9063189Z

2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065029Z {
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065122Z     public class Sample1_HelloWorld
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065196Z     {
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065269Z         [Test]
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065399Z         [Ignore("Only verifying that the sample builds")]
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065519Z         public async Task CreateAnalysisServer()
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065590Z         {
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065695Z             #region Snippet:CreateAnalysisServer
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065877Z             ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9065886Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066096Z             // Get a resource group
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066225Z             string subscriptionId = "<subscription-id>";
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066375Z             string resourceGroupName = "<resource-group-name>";
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066514Z             ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await client
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066783Z                 .GetSubscriptionResource(new ResourceIdentifier($"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}"))
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066873Z                 .GetResourceGroups()
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066978Z                 .GetAsync(resourceGroupName);
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9066982Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067102Z             // Get the Analysis Services server collection
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067330Z             AnalysisServerCollection collection = resourceGroup.GetAnalysisServers();
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067335Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067415Z             // Define the server
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067531Z             string serverName = "myanalysisserver";
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067747Z             var sku = new AnalysisResourceSku("S1") { Tier = AnalysisSkuTier.Standard };
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067990Z             var serverData = new AnalysisServerData(new Azure.Core.AzureLocation("eastus"), sku);
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9067994Z 
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9068076Z             // Create the server

2026-04-20T10:43:22.9068415Z                 WaitUntil.Completed,
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9068493Z                 serverName,
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9068566Z              
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9068636Z ...
2026-04-20T10:43:22.9068764Z (truncated, showing first 65536 bytes of 93237 total)
